title: QQT´s Optimine
description: Optimine is your all in one Optimisation Pack! Make your old PC perform like a new one!
body: # 🚀Make your old PC Perform like a new one: **🥳 Now Updated to 1.21** - Get much more FPS than with any other client! - High Performance Shaders included (Miniature Shader) - Connected Blocks and Glass - Optifine like Zoom (With Scrolling!) - Compatible with Optifine Shaders (mostly) - Swich your Language Faster - Load Texturepacks up to 3 times faster - Get More TPS (Ticks per Second) in Singleplayer Worlds - Optimised Mob Rendering # **Performance Tests and Numbers:** ### Newest Test ⚡ **Gaming Computer:** - AMD Ryzen 5600X - 16 GB DDR4 Memory (3600 MHz) - AMD Radeon 6600 XT - Samsung 990 Pro - Windows 11 Pro 🌌 **Test Results:** - QQT´s Optimine: 2062 FPS (max. 2553 FPS | avg. 2500 FPS) - With Complemantary Shaders Reimagined + QQT´s Optimine: 415 FPS ### First Test 🥔 **10 year old Laptop Stats:** - AMD A-10-5745M APU with Radeon(tm) HD Graphics - 12 GB DDR3 Memory - San Disk SSD Plus (1TB) - no GPU (just an internal one) - Windows 10 ⚡ **Test Results:** - QQT´s Optimine: 90 FPS (max. 110 FPS | avg. 64 FPS) - With Miniature Shader + QQT´s Optimine: 30 FPS ### Second Test 🥔 **Avarage Office Laptop (with iGPU):** - Intel i5 Gen 8 (Laptop Edition) - 8 GB DDR4 Memory - Crucial SATA M.2 SSD (1TB) - Intel UHD 620 (Integrated Graphics) - Windows 11 ⚡ **Test Results:** - QQT´s Optimine: 120 FPS (max. 220 FPS | avg. 110 FPS) - With Miniature Shader + QQT´s Optimine: 91 FPS
